name: roon-extension-ikea-tradfri
description: Roon Extension for switching IKEA Trådfri smart switches
author: Hasse Hagen Johansen

scripts.update-registry-version: node -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const fs = require('fs'); let reg = fs.readFileSync('.reg/settings', 'utf8'); reg = reg.replace(/^VERSION=.*/m, 'VERSION=' + pkg.version); fs.writeFileSync('.reg/settings', reg); console.log('Updated .reg/settings with version', pkg.version);"
